_rules: MAJOR — engine rewrites, map changes, save format breaks
MINOR — new gameplay systems (economy, multiplayer, battle queue...)
PATCH — bugfixes, UI tweaks, balance changes
changelog: draft indicator as plain green number; no volunteers event; draft timers shortened (dictators 1t, others 1-2t); buildings map mode; buildings/resistance hidden outside own modes; MP: block UI on opponent turn (map modes stay live); MP rejoin on disconnect/reload; enemy move arrows hidden
